Appearances:
Plaintiff Liana Tahir is present. Represent by Julie Aviles.
Attorney Brenda C. Keith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Cynthia Carrillo and Leonard Sedillo are present.
Attorney Susan Welch representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of July-23-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
